{{Quote|What do I think about it? I don't know, really. Nobody's ever asked me for my opinion before.|RC-5093|<ref name="RC:HC" />}}
'''RC-5093''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Ultimately surviving the conflict, RC-5093 went on to retire from the [[Republic Military/Legends|military]] and began living in the [[CF VetCenter]] located on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During [[Gender/Legends|his]] retirement, RC-5093 was asked what he thought about the Clone Wars, but, having never been able to form his own opinion or beliefs, the former [[Commando/Legends|commando]] was unable to answer.

==Biography==
Bred on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]],<ref name="SWE" /> RC-5093<ref name="RC:HC" /> was one of the many [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].<ref name="CT:DB">{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}}</ref> Trained to be a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|84|RC-5093}}</ref> RC-5093 was created to serve in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]].<ref name="CT:DB" />

RC-5093 survived the Clone Wars, and he later retired from the [[Republic Military/Legends|military]] was interviewed at the [[CF VetCenter]] on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During the interview, RC-5093 was asked how he felt about the war for which he had been bred, but he was unable to formulate a reply, having never before been asked his opinion. The former [[Commando/Legends|commando]] was twenty-three [[Galactic Standard Calendar|standard years]] old when he was asked the question, but, due to the advanced aging process of all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], RC-5093 was sixty biological [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old at the [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Personality and traits==
As a clone commando,<ref name="CSWE" /> RC-5093<ref name="RC:HC" /> was trained for covert infiltration, [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]], demolition, and [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]].<ref name="SW:RC">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref> RC-5093 stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall,<ref name="SWE" /> like all other clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]].<ref name="CT:DB" /> However, also like other clone troopers, RC-5093 had his individuality and independence suppressed during his training and was therefore unable to form his own opinions. Thus, when asked about his opinion on the Clone Wars, RC-5093 was unable to reply.<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Behind the scenes==
RC-5093 first appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]]; he was quoted at the beginning of the novel's sixteenth chapter.<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}}
